meta.title: About
meta.description: Esther's work style is mysterious and surreal. She is used to presenting in a jumping and obscure way as well as combined with delicate brush strokes in order to convey warmth and connect with viewers.

contentList.text:
Yi Shan is a Taiwanese illustrator and visual artist based in London, UK, specialising in publishing-focused visual work, including magazine illustration, publication design, and narrative-driven imagery, alongside music-related visuals.

Her practice explores emotion, solitude, and personal growth through quiet reflection. She uses warm yet subtly mysterious and surreal imagery, combined with metaphor and negative space, to create immersive visual narratives.

She is particularly interested in poetry and storytelling within publishing contexts, and also works across music-related projects, aiming to translate words and sound into thoughtful, emotionally resonant visual language.

伊珊是一位台灣插畫與視覺藝術家，目前居住並工作於英國倫敦，專注於以出版為核心的視覺創作，包括雜誌插畫、出版設計，以及以敘事為導向的影像創作，同時也涵蓋音樂相關的視覺作品。

她的創作透過安靜的自我反思，探索情感、孤獨與個人成長。作品運用溫暖卻帶有細微神秘感與超現實氛圍的影像語言，結合隱喻與留白，構築沉浸式的視覺敘事。

她特別關注出版語境中的詩意與敘事創作，並也參與音樂相關專案，致力於將文字與聲音轉化為細膩且富有情感共鳴的視覺語言。曾與刊物及多項商業專案合作，並獲得多項國際插畫獎項肯定。
